action.reasoning: Observation: 18-model ensemble achieved new best AUC 0.7515 (up from 0.7511). Improvement is diminishing with linear weighting. Remaining time ~8.7 min. Analysis: Try exponential weighting (weight = exp(k * val_auc)) to more aggressively favor better models in the ensemble. Also could try temperature scaling. This is a quick change to predict.py that could squeeze out more performance without needing to train new models.
